title: ops/slides.py: read operations (list_slides, list_layouts)
description: Implement the read half of `pypptx/ops/slides.py`: `list_slides(path: Path) -> list[dict]` returning dicts with `index` (1-based), `file`, and `hidden`; and `list_layouts(path: Path) -> list[dict]` returning dicts with `index` and `file`. Both accept either a `.pptx` or an unpacked directory. Use python-pptx for all access.
acceptance_criteria: `list_slides()` returns entries in presentation order; `index` is 1-based.
`hidden` is `True` only when the slide's `show` attribute is explicitly `false`/`0`.
`list_layouts()` returns all layouts from `ppt/slideLayouts/` in file-name order; `index` is 1-based.
Both functions accept a `.pptx` file path or an already-unpacked directory.
python-pptx is the only XML-level library used here.
